mnemonics: Elsevier EIGHTEEN: Encrypted Gateways Help Everyone Lock The Entire Network (for the 2018 Elsevier publication on cloud security trends)
keyPoints: The Elsevier 2018 publication likely focused on emerging cloud security threats and countermeasures prevalent at that time.
It probably emphasized the shared responsibility model between cloud providers and consumers for security.
A key focus was likely on data encryption, both at rest and in transit, as a fundamental security control in the cloud.
commonMistakes: Assuming the cloud provider is solely responsible for all security aspects (ignoring the shared responsibility model).
Neglecting to encrypt data, believing infrastructure security alone is sufficient protection.
